_status: UI/control + validation schema, updated 2026-07-11 — see design/ux-product-spec.md Phase 4 Definition of Done and agent-build-plan.md Phase 4's 'Also produce' section.
_note: This registry defines HOW each field is rendered and validated (control type, data type, numeric bounds, decimal places, required-ness, error copy) — it does NOT hold benchmark numbers or tooltip prose. Actual default values live in equipment-data/<type>.json (equipment-specific) or equipment-data/common-assumptions.json (shared), each with its own confidence/sourceId. Tooltip content lives in content/tooltip-copy.md (the 7-slot structure) — each entry below points to it via 'tooltipKey' rather than duplicating text, which is the reconciliation content/tooltip-copy.md's own header flagged as outstanding (this file previously carried an earlier, simpler 4-slot tooltip object for 10 fields; that's removed here in favor of the single tooltip-copy.md source of truth). Field keys below are readable, provisional machine IDs — Phase 5's wizard-state.md is the authoritative place final IDs get fixed; re-keying then is mechanical, not a schema rewrite. Numeric min/max bounds are UI sanity/validation bounds only, not benchmark claims — per this project's no-invented-benchmarks rule, they don't imply a 'typical' value.
_templateNote: Several Advanced Mode fields repeat per payer type, per ramp-up period, or per year of useful life (SPEC.md §11.1 groups A/B/E). Rather than enumerate every instance as a separate near-duplicate entry, those are written once as a template with the repeat dimension named explicitly — Phase 5/6 expand each into concrete machine keys (e.g. one per payer type) using the same bounds.

equipmentCategory.label: Equipment category
equipmentCategory.errorMessage: Select an equipment type to continue.

hospitalName.label: Hospital name
hospitalName.errorMessage: Enter the hospital name to continue.

cityTier.label: City / tier
cityTier.errorMessage: Select the city tier closest to your hospital's location.
cityTier.resolvedNote: SPEC.md §36.1 Q7, resolved 2026-07-11: required, same benchmarking-lookup role as bed size.

hospitalType.label: Hospital type
hospitalType.errorMessage: Select a hospital type, or leave blank.
hospitalType.resolvedNote: SPEC.md §36.1 Q5, resolved 2026-07-11: optional, informational/report-context only — no formula in financial-model-spec.md or /formulas currently consumes this field.

purchaseCost.label: Purchase cost
purchaseCost.errorMessage: Enter the equipment's purchase cost (0-100 Crore).

installationCost.label: Installation / civil cost
installationCost.errorMessage: Enter installation/civil cost (0-50 Crore). Check your vendor's turnkey quote doesn't already include this.

launchDelayMonths.label: Expected months before revenue starts
launchDelayMonths.errorMessage: Enter a value between 0 and 36 months.

usagePerDay.label: Expected usage per day
usagePerDay.errorMessage: Enter a number between 0 and 50 scans/procedures per day.

billedTariffPerUse.label: Average billed revenue per use
billedTariffPerUse.errorMessage: Enter a billed amount between ₹500 and ₹25,000.

workingDaysPerMonth.label: Working days per month
workingDaysPerMonth.errorMessage: Enter a value between 20 and 31 days.

consumableCostPerUse.label: Consumable cost per use
consumableCostPerUse.errorMessage: Consumable cost per use can't be negative.

professionalFeePerUse.label: Professional / reporting fee per use
professionalFeePerUse.resolvedNote: SPEC.md §36.1 Q13 and §10.2, resolved: optional but visible in Basic Mode, uniformly across equipment types — not mandatory, not equipment-specific.
professionalFeePerUse.errorMessage: Professional fee per use can't be negative.

otherVariableCostPerUse.label: Other variable cost per use
otherVariableCostPerUse.errorMessage: Other variable cost per use can't be negative.

staffCostPerMonth.label: Staff cost per month
staffCostPerMonth.errorMessage: Staff cost per month can't be negative.

electricityCostPerMonth.label: Electricity / utility cost per month
electricityCostPerMonth.errorMessage: Electricity/utility cost per month can't be negative.

otherFixedCostPerMonth.label: Other fixed operating cost per month
otherFixedCostPerMonth.errorMessage: Other fixed cost per month can't be negative.
otherFixedCostPerMonth.tooltipKey: Other fixed operating cost per month

warrantyYears.label: Warranty period
warrantyYears.errorMessage: Enter a warranty period between 0 and 10 years.

amcCmcCostPostWarranty.label: AMC / CMC cost after warranty
amcCmcCostPostWarranty.resolvedNote: capexiq-prebuild-assurance PBA-4, 2026-07-13 (confirmed by Jay 2026-07-13, ISS-16 resolved -- originally logged as ISS-14, renumbered at merge time to avoid colliding with the parallel capexiq-ui-assurance audit's own ISS-14/ISS-15): Basic Mode deliberately collapses formulas/maintenance.ts's CMC-then-AMC schedule into one flat rate applied for the entire post-warranty period (cmcYears is treated as 0 in the Basic-mode formula call) -- Advanced Group E's new cmcYears field plus the existing maintenanceCostByYearPct per-year array are the only way to model the true stepped warranty→CMC→AMC cliff.
amcCmcCostPostWarranty.defaultSource: A duration-weighted blend, not AMC-only or CMC-only, since CMC is typically pricier and an AMC-only default would systematically understate cost: blendedRate = (cmcYears × equipment-data/<type>.json#cmcAnnualCostPercentage.typical + (usefulLifeYears − warrantyYears − cmcYears) × #amcAnnualCostPercentage.typical) ÷ (usefulLifeYears − warrantyYears)
amcCmcCostPostWarranty.errorMessage: Enter a value between 0% and 20% of purchase cost.

A_revenueRealizationAndPayerMix._group: SPEC.md §11.1 A — Revenue realization and payer mix

payerMixSharePct.label: Payer mix share
payerMixSharePct.template: Repeats per payer type: Private cash, Insurance/TPA, Corporate credit, PM-JAY/government, Other.
payerMixSharePct.groupConstraint: The 5 payer-type shares must sum to 100%.
payerMixSharePct.errorMessage: Enter a percentage between 0 and 100; all payer shares must sum to 100%.
payerMixSharePct.tooltipKey: Payer mix shares (private cash / insurance-TPA / corporate credit / PM-JAY-government / other)

billedTariffByPayerType.label: Billed tariff by payer type
billedTariffByPayerType.template: Repeats per payer type (see payerMixSharePct); optional override of Basic Mode's billedTariffPerUse.

claimDeductionPctByPayerType.label: Claim deduction / disallowance % by payer type
claimDeductionPctByPayerType.tooltipKey: Claim deduction / disallowance % by payer type

collectionDelayDaysByPayerType.label: Collection delay / DSO by payer type
collectionDelayDaysByPayerType.errorMessage: Enter a number of days between 0 and 180.
collectionDelayDaysByPayerType.tooltipKey: Collection delay / DSO by payer type

utilizationRampPct.label: Utilization ramp-up %
utilizationRampPct.template: Repeats per period: Month 1-3, Month 4-6, Month 7-12, Year 2 onward.

C_financing._group: SPEC.md §11.1 C — Financing (fields below apply only when basic.acquisitionMode is Loan or Lease)

loanInterestRate.label: Interest rate
loanInterestRate.errorMessage: Enter an interest rate between 0% and 30%.

loanTenureMonths.label: Loan tenure
loanTenureMonths.errorMessage: Enter a loan tenure between 1 and 240 months.

moratoriumPeriodMonths.label: Moratorium period
moratoriumPeriodMonths.errorMessage: Enter a value between 0 and 24 months.

leaseTenureMonths.label: Lease tenure
leaseTenureMonths.note: Added 2026-07-13 (ISS-18, Jay's decision after an Opus advisor pass): mirrors loanTenureMonths — after this many months, the lease payment stops and the equipment is modeled as owned outright for the rest of usefulLifeYears (finance/capital-lease treatment), rather than the rental running for the entire useful-life horizon.
leaseTenureMonths.errorMessage: Enter a lease tenure between 1 and 240 months.

D_launchDelayAndPreOpeningCost._group: SPEC.md §11.1 D — Launch delay and pre-opening cost

civilWorkDurationMonths.label: Civil work duration
civilWorkDurationMonths.errorMessage: Enter a value between 0 and 24 months.
civilWorkDurationMonths.tooltipKey: Civil work / installation / licensing-approval / training-commissioning duration

installationDurationMonths.label: Installation duration
installationDurationMonths.errorMessage: Enter a value between 0 and 24 months.
installationDurationMonths.tooltipKey: Civil work / installation / licensing-approval / training-commissioning duration

licensingApprovalDurationMonths.label: Licensing / approval duration
licensingApprovalDurationMonths.errorMessage: Enter a value between 0 and 24 months.
licensingApprovalDurationMonths.tooltipKey: Civil work / installation / licensing-approval / training-commissioning duration

trainingCommissioningDurationMonths.label: Training / commissioning duration
trainingCommissioningDurationMonths.errorMessage: Enter a value between 0 and 24 months.
trainingCommissioningDurationMonths.tooltipKey: Civil work / installation / licensing-approval / training-commissioning duration

preOpeningFixedCosts.label: Pre-opening fixed costs
preOpeningFixedCosts.errorMessage: Pre-opening fixed costs can't be negative.

workingCapitalBufferAmount.label: Working capital buffer
workingCapitalBufferAmount.errorMessage: Working capital buffer can't be negative.

E_maintenanceAndLifecycleCost._group: SPEC.md §11.1 E — Maintenance and lifecycle cost

cmcYears.label: CMC coverage period after warranty
cmcYears.note: Added 2026-07-13 (capexiq-prebuild-assurance PBA-4) -- formulas/maintenance.ts's maintenanceScheduleForYears() requires this as a parameter distinct from warrantyYears (years covered by warranty) and totalYears (useful life): it's how many years of CMC (comprehensive, parts+labor) coverage follow the warranty before AMC (labor-only) coverage begins. Previously had no wizard field anywhere. Basic Mode does not collect this -- it treats the whole post-warranty period as one flat rate (basic.amcCmcCostPostWarranty); this field only matters if maintenanceCostByYearPct isn't used to override the schedule directly.
cmcYears.errorMessage: Enter a CMC coverage period between 0 and 15 years.

maintenanceCostByYearPct.label: AMC / CMC cost by year
maintenanceCostByYearPct.template: Repeats per year of useful life (see advanced.F.usefulLifeYears); optional stepped-schedule override of basic.amcCmcCostPostWarranty.

majorReplacementCost.label: Major replacement cost
majorReplacementCost.errorMessage: Major replacement cost can't be negative.

downtimeAssumption.label: Downtime assumption
downtimeAssumption.note: Not implemented in v1 — no formula consumes this. Reserved per tooltip-copy.md.

discountRate.label: Discount rate
discountRate.errorMessage: Enter a discount rate between 0% and 30%.

targetIrr.label: Target IRR (hurdle rate)
targetIrr.resolvedNote: Independently flagged twice, 2026-07-12/13, by two parallel audits (capexiq-ui-assurance's F1/ISS-14 and capexiq-prebuild-assurance's PBA-5) -- both found required:true with no sourced default would block Basic-Mode users. Resolved per the ui-assurance audit's fix (Jay's decision, Opus-advisor-reviewed): auto-fill rather than loosen the requirement.
targetIrr.defaultSource: Computed heuristic (audit F1, resolved 2026-07-12, Jay's decision): discountRate + 400bps, auto-filled and shown with the standard 'Typical' tag (design/ux-product-spec.md §6) — never left blank. Not a researched benchmark; equipment-data/common-assumptions.json#targetIrr stays 'Unavailable' as the honest research status, this is a UI-level suggested-starting-point heuristic (already documented there and in financial-model-spec.md §1.6) applied so Basic Mode never blocks on an unresearchable field. User can override in Advanced Mode; not consumed by the Investment Outlook score itself (financial-model-spec.md §1.6 uses discountRate as the hurdle).
targetIrr.errorMessage: Enter a target IRR between 0% and 50%.

inflationRate.label: Inflation rate
inflationRate.note: Not yet consumed by any formula in this version — collected for future use.

usefulLifeYears.label: Useful life
usefulLifeYears.errorMessage: Enter a useful life between 1 and 30 years.

depreciationMethod.label: Depreciation method
depreciationMethod.note: Only method supported in v1 — field exists for future extensibility, not currently a real choice.

taxAssumptions.label: Tax assumptions
taxAssumptions.note: Not implemented in v1 — no formula consumes this. Reserved per tooltip-copy.md.

priceEscalationPct.label: Price escalation
priceEscalationPct.note: Not yet consumed by any formula in this version — distinct from the automatic actionable-insight engine's own tariff-increase testing (financial-model-spec.md §4).

costEscalationPct.label: Cost escalation
costEscalationPct.note: Not yet consumed by any formula in this version.

scenarioAssumptions.label: Scenario assumptions
scenarioAssumptions.note: A named set of overrides for scenario comparison (SPEC.md §28), not a single validated field — its own UI is designed in Phase 9, not here.
